RT @mdavidallen: @mrejfox the shared culture is the "culture of more" and an absence of a guiding principle that indicates why the activity…
Both are so gross gross gross but if you peel away layers its the same culture and personality underneath.

In Silicon Valley I met the Growth Hacker, with a wild toolbelt of varying morality and a singular goal of more users. Then in New York I met Outrage Hacker, a writer who does not seem to believe in anything than being contrarian, with the singular goal of more reads.
